name: Basmu
description: This Sentient war instrument can either barrage targets with explosive bolts or draw on its regenerative battery to create twin plasma beams that chain through targets. When fully drained, Health is leeched from nearby foes for a short period.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: This Sentient war instrument can either barrage targets with explosive bolts or draw on its regenerative battery to create twin plasma beams that chain through targets. When fully drained, Health is leeched from nearby foes for a short period.

components.name: Carbides
components.description:
Resilient components used to reinforce the plated sheets of metal strapped to Grineer Ships.

Location: Eximus units in the Grineer Shipyard Tileset, and Railjack missions in Earth, Saturn, and Veil Proximas

components.name: Isos
components.description:
A self-replicating fluid comprised of nanoproxies capable of independently repairing worn and damaged systems.

Location: Railjack missions in Venus, Neptune, and Pluto Proximas

components.name: Nullstones
components.description:
Nullstones do not conform to several laws of physics, making them highly prized for optimizing sensitive components.

Location: Railjack Missions

components.name: Titanium
components.description:
This highly malleable metal was exploited in great quantities by the Orokin and can now only be found within space rock.

Location: Railjack Missions

patchlogs.name: Update 30.9.0: Prime Resurgence
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Basmu lifesteal reload sound getting spammed if you were knocked down. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1283405-basmu-sound-bug/

patchlogs.name: Update 29.6.0: Orphix Venom!
patchlogs.fixes:
Basmu Blueprint
Basmu and Ceti Lacera Blueprints are now tradeable.

patchlogs.name: Nightwave Series 3: Glassmaker: Hotfix 27.5.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Basmu reload not providing Health if you’re the Client.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the Basmu’s firing sound FX from other players.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to equip Flight Speed Mods, such as Terminal Velocity, on the Basmu.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.16
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Basmu's healing pulse receiving exponential copies of equipped Mods with each pulse when under the effect of some conditional buffs, which led to unintended amounts of damage.

patchlogs.name: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed becoming invincible when interrupting the Basmu reload and Transferring to the Operator and using Unairu Void Spines.
Another fix towards all future Basmu damage dealing lifesteal to enemies if the ‘heal on reload’ is interrupted as a Client.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed the replication of the Basmu reload Health FX so that only the user will see the FX to aid in performance.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Shedu and Basmu reload FX being visible while invisible.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Basmu Alt Fire mode not healing on reload.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.5
patchlogs.changes: Fixed all future Basmu damage dealing lifesteal to enemies if the ‘heal on reload’ is interrupted. This had to be timed very correctly by actions such as Transferring to the Operator, casting Abilities, etc.
